cases.description: added file maps all added lines to its function owner
replacement keeps independent base and head identities on the same path
deletion-only change builds a base-source ReviewUnit
pure rename retains both source roles without fabricating changed lines
rename with edit maps replacement lines on both paths
empty ChangeSet has a deterministic empty build envelope
binary input emits a structured unsupported diagnostic without source units
multiple atoms owned by one declaration merge into one Unit
one atom crossing two methods retains both owners
field changes prefer the exact field review region
multiline import changes prefer the import review region
source without a declaration uses a bounded fallback window
unchanged lines inside the atom span remain context rather than changed lines
degraded parser quality propagates to every selected Unit
multiple files have deterministic normalized output order
same path and declaration coordinates still receive revision-scoped Unit identities
